# Test Fixtures — Export Regression Corpus

Design YAML files used as inputs for export regression tests (Gerber, BOM,
pick-and-place, KiCad, SVG, etc.).  Each fixture covers a distinct design
configuration.

| Fixture            | Layers | Components | Nets | Purpose |
|--------------------|--------|------------|------|---------|
| minimal_2layer     | 2      | 2          | 2    | Minimal 2-layer design with R + C |
